title: Doflamingo Finds His Brother
description: Pages 19–19 focus on doflamingo finds his brother, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Corazon, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as corazon and Law are trapped between Marines, pirates, and Doflamingo while the Ope Ope no Mi becomes the center of the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who the hell is this!? Fuckin' scared the shit out of me!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Oi! Some bastard in a black coat has stolen the damn ope ope no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't you dare let him get away!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law! I know you're in pain, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait for me there! Just a while longer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll be back as fast as I can!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: An Unbeliev- able act of clumsiness!? Corazon's in a pinch!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: With the ope ope no mi!

summary: Doflamingo Finds His Brother advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Corazon, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
